topics.title: Radio Industry News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including the loss of advertising revenue at CBS, upcoming guests like M. Night Shyamalan, and celebrity news regarding Pam Anderson, Carmen Electra, and Nelly Furtado.

topics.title: Prank Calls and Religious Debates
topics.summary: The studio plays a series of prank calls to various callers, including a preacher and a psychic, while discussing topics like evolution versus faith.

topics.title: John Edwards and the Munsters Movie
topics.summary: The studio discusses John Edwards' claims of psychic abilities, a new Munsters film being developed by the Wayans brothers, and legal issues surrounding a former employee's sexual harassment claim.

topics.title: JD's Vacation and Film Projects
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where JD discusses his recent vacation, his lack of social skills, and the production of his upcoming film projects.

topics.title: Telemarketing Calls and Relationship Discussions
topics.summary: The studio features segments involving humorous interactions with telemarketers, discussions regarding Siobhan's daughter, and the airing of a promotional interview featuring Beth Ostrovsky.

topics.title: Legal Analysis of Workplace Sexual Harassment Case
topics.summary: The studio examines the legal nuances and personal implications surrounding an alleged sexual harassment and retaliation lawsuit involving a married man, his wife Christie Brinkley, and a young employee.

topics.title: Dominatrix and Adult Film Performers Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a segment featuring a dominatrix and two adult film performers who discuss their professional experiences, personal lives, and specific sexual acts performed for the camera.

topics.title: Guest Interaction and Pasta Sauce Incident
topics.summary: The studio features a segment involving guests who perform for the camera, culminating in an incident where pasta sauce is spilled on a guest's head.

topics.title: M. Night Shyamalan's Film Development and Studio Conflicts
topics.summary: The studio details the creative challenges of developing "Lady in the Water," including a tense negotiation with Disney over the film's unconventional tone and his decision to prioritize artistic integrity over corporate approval.

topics.title: Lady in the Water Film Promotion
topics.summary: The studio discusses the production of "Lady in the Water," the casting of Paul Giamatti, and the film's upcoming release.

topics.title: Film Projects and Professional Disputes
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding film roles, upcoming projects, and a heated dispute between two comedians over unpaid fees and professional collaboration.

topics.title: Payment Dispute Between Dice and Artie Lang
topics.summary: The studio records a heated confrontation between comedians regarding a delayed payment of five thousand dollars for a performance.

topics.title: Payment Dispute Between Artie Lange and Andrew Dice
topics.summary: The studio features a heated debate between Artie Lange and Andrew Dice Clay regarding a delayed payment for a comedy performance, involving calls from listeners and agents to mediate the conflict.

topics.title: Artie Lange and Andrew Dice Clay Dispute
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange between Artie Lange and Andrew Dice Clay regarding a payment dispute and professional miscommunications.

topics.title: Script Reading and Casting Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding unpaid debts, upcoming television roles involving scripted make-out scenes, and the logistics of filming with various actors.

topics.title: New Jersey Police Chief Controversy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the controversy surrounding an acting police chief in Newark whose past photos from a 1993 pageant are being used to question his character.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Middle East Conflict
topics.summary: The show covers Jessica Beale's charitable offer, the escalating conflict in Lebanon and Israel, FCC crackdowns on broadcast profanity, and various entertainment news including a new book about the Playboy Mansion and an upcoming animated film.
